{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Jai family home
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|One of the [[Jai]] family homes contains a decorative tower, a tree with pink leaves, and a statue of a crane and a [[dragon]] in combat.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
